creator: aehlig@linta.de
text:
Created attachment 213318
Patch for devel/bazel to fix patching for i386

The file tools/cpp/BUILD.static.freebsd has been renamed in bazel 3.0.0 thus breaking the EXTRA_PATCH for i386[1]. Change the patch to reflect the renaming.


[1] http://beefy5.nyi.freebsd.org/data/121i386-default/531468/logs/bazel-3.0.0.log
